text: Everyone stand up and jump 3 times together!
Team captain does 5 jumping jacks while team cheers.
Swap seats with someone from another team, then swap back.
Strike your team's power pose and hold it for 10 seconds.
March around the room making eye contact with 3 other people.
Do your best impression of a superhero and fly to another team.
Team does a synchronized wave with your arms, left to right.
Spin around once, then give your team a high-five.
Reach as high as you can, then touch your toes—repeat 3 times.
Walk backward to the next team and introduce yourselves.
Go around your team: complete this sentence: 'If I could change one thing at work...'
Tell your team your superpower and why you have it.
Shout out one fun fact about each teammate you just learned.
Together, come up with a team motto and say it 3 times.
What's one thing you're excited to explore in today's session? Share!
Tell your team about a time you solved a problem together.
Describe your ideal product in 30 seconds—have your team add one feature each.
Ask your team: 'What would our perfect customer day look like?'
Discuss: What's one skill every team member brings to the table?
Share your team's biggest win from the last quarter.
Sketch a product that doesn't exist yet. Title it and present it!
Build a tower with office supplies. Make it at least 12 inches tall.
Name a new ice cream flavor together, then pitch it like a commercial.
Create a team logo using only paper and markers. Explain the inspiration.
Invent a new holiday and describe 3 traditions for it.
Design a new feature for a product your team loves. Draw or describe it.
Write a 4-line team song or rap. Perform it for the room.
Build a Rube Goldberg machine with paper, pens, and tape. Test it once.
Create a meme or funny sign about innovation. Show and explain it.
Design a new parking lot for your company. What would make it amazing?
Your choice: Move, Talk, or Create. What does your team need right now?
Team votes: Pick any previous prompt and do it again, but twice as energetic!
Surprise! You get to lead the whole room in a 20-second dance or chant.
Your pick: Teach another team something cool, or learn from them.
Combine a Move with a Talk: Do an activity while explaining why you chose it.
